title: Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Indraprastha Apollo Capital India:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
